'''鈭歵-sh-l-j''' ('''katashlejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrolize|electrolize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrolize|electrolize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-sh-l-j
|-
! Lemma
| katashlejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitashlejoko|thitashlejoko]] || [[word:jitashlejoko|jitashlejoko]] || [[word:shitashlejoko|shitashlejoko]] || [[word:kitashlejoko|kitashlejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutashlejoko|thuthutashlejoko]] || [[word:jujutashlejoko|jujutashlejoko]] || [[word:shushutashlejoko|shushutashlejoko]] || [[word:kukutashlejoko|kukutashlejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutashlejoko|thutashlejoko]] || [[word:jutashlejoko|jutashlejoko]] || [[word:shutashlejoko|shutashlejoko]] || [[word:kutashlejoko|kutashlejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutashlejoko|thutashlejoko]] || [[word:jutashlejoko|jutashlejoko]] || [[word:shutashlejoko|shutashlejoko]] || [[word:kutashlejoko|kutashlejoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotashlejoko|thothotashlejoko]] || [[word:jojotashlejoko|jojotashlejoko]] || [[word:shoshotashlejoko|shoshotashlejoko]] || [[word:kokotashlejoko|kokotashlejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotashlejoko|thotashlejoko]] || [[word:jotashlejoko|jotashlejoko]] || [[word:shotashlejoko|shotashlejoko]] || [[word:kotashlejoko|kotashlejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotashlejoko|thotashlejoko]] || [[word:jotashlejoko|jotashlejoko]] || [[word:shotashlejoko|shotashlejoko]] || [[word:kotashlejoko|kotashlejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tashlejoko|th忙tashlejoko]] || [[word:j忙tashlejoko|j忙tashlejoko]] || [[word:sh忙tashlejoko|sh忙tashlejoko]] || [[word:k忙tashlejoko|k忙tashlejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatashlejoko|thathatashlejoko]] || [[word:jajatashlejoko|jajatashlejoko]] || [[word:shashatashlejoko|shashatashlejoko]] || [[word:kakatashlejoko|kakatashlejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatashlejoko|thatashlejoko]] || [[word:jatashlejoko|jatashlejoko]] || [[word:shatashlejoko|shatashlejoko]] || [[word:katashlejoko|katashlejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatashlejoko|thatashlejoko]] || [[word:jatashlejoko|jatashlejoko]] || [[word:shatashlejoko|shatashlejoko]] || [[word:katashlejoko|katashlejoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
